_doc.purpose: Hand-curated corrections applied by build_crosswalk.py AFTER auto-matching, so re-runs are deterministic and manual fixes are never lost.
_doc.country_aliases: ESPN-spelling -> GFR-spelling, in addition to the defaults baked into the script. Matched case-insensitively.
_doc.leagues: ESPN league slug -> GFR league api_football_id (force a league pairing).
_doc.teams: ESPN team id (string) -> GFR team api_football_id to force the pairing, or null to block a wrong auto-match and leave the team unmatched.
